examples: Growing together with a sandalwood tree.
Those made of real sandalwood are much more expensive.
We know your company handles Chinese sandalwood furniture.
Allylix has duplicated the smell of sandalwood industrially, by extracting the genes for the relevant enzymes from sandalwood trees.
Just outside the Tatopani customs office, I saw for myself two impounded trucks with illegal cargoes of red sandalwood.
